records.question: Which customers named Stella live at 5607 Ryann Canyon, have the email kristina85@example.org, phone number +43(3)1861877192, and pay by Direct Debit?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Stella' AND customers.customer_address = '5607 Ryann Canyon' AND customers.customer_email = 'kristina85@example.org' AND customers.customer_phone = '+43(3)1861877192' AND customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers AS customers 
JOIN Customer_Addresses AS addresses ON customers.customer_id = addresses.customer_id 
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Stella' 
AND addresses.customer_address = '5607 Ryann Canyon' 
AND customers.customer_email = 'kristina85@example.org' 
AND customers.customer_phone = '+43(3)1861877192' 
AND customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit'

records.question: Which customers named Geovanny live at 0813 Carolina Bridge Suite 488?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_address = '0813 Carolina Bridge Suite 488' AND customers.customer_name = 'Geovanny'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM Customers
JOIN Customer_Addresses ON Customers.customer_id = Customer_Addresses.customer_id
JOIN Mailshot_Customers ON Customers.customer_id = Mailshot_Customers.customer_id
WHERE Customer_Addresses.customer_address = '0813 Carolina Bridge Suite 488'
AND Customers.customer_name = 'Geovanny'

records.question: Who are the customers named Wendell with email rodriguez.nathanael@example.net, phone (773)971-9411x759, paying by Credit Card, living at 618 Webster Stream Apt. 161, whose mailshot outcome is Order and whose address date is 2018-03-08 08:03:51?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'rodriguez.nathanael@example.net' AND customers.customer_phone = '(773)971-9411x759' AND mailshot_customers.outcome_code = 'Order' AND customer_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-08 08:03:51' AND customers.customer_name = 'Wendell' AND customers.payment_method = 'Credit Card' AND customers.customer_address = '618 Webster Stream Apt. 161'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM Customers customers
JOIN Customer_Addresses customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN Mailshot_Customers mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'rodriguez.nathanael@example.net'
  AND customers.customer_phone = '(773)971-9411x759'
  AND customers.customer_name = 'Wendell'
  AND customers.payment_method = 'Credit Card'
  AND customers.customer_address = '618 Webster Stream Apt. 161'
  AND customer_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-08 08:03:51'
  AND mailshot_customers.outcome_code = 'Order'

records.question: Which customers have the email marc.schiller@example.com, phone number 203-036-0511x96487, use Direct Debit as their payment method, have password 67e9037197, and have a billing address of 94105 Bahringer Oval Suite 178 that started exactly on 1929-05-14 04:29:43?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_email = 'marc.schiller@example.com' AND customer_addresses.date_address_from = '1929-05-14 04:29:43' AND customers.customer_address = '94105 Bahringer Oval Suite 178' AND customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit' AND customers.customer_password = '67e9037197' AND customer_addresses.address_type_code = 'Billing' AND customers.customer_phone = '203-036-0511x96487'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id 
FROM Customers 
JOIN Customer_Addresses ON Customers.customer_id = Customer_Addresses.customer_id 
WHERE Customers.customer_email = 'marc.schiller@example.com' 
AND Customers.customer_address = '94105 Bahringer Oval Suite 178' 
AND Customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit' 
AND Customers.customer_password = '67e9037197' 
AND Customers.customer_phone = '203-036-0511x96487' 
AND Customer_Addresses.date_address_from = '1929-05-14 04:29:43' 
AND Customer_Addresses.address_type_code = 'Billing'

records.question: Which customers have the email elva.mccullough@example.org and phone number (840)754-4148x20545, whose shipping address was active exactly on March 13, 2018 at 08:21:27, and have orders delivered on or after March 20, 2018 at 12:00:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-13 08:21:27' AND customers.customer_phone = '(840)754-4148x20545' AND customer_orders.order_delivered_datetime >= '2018-03-20 12:00:00' AND customers.customer_email = 'elva.mccullough@example.org' AND customer_addresses.address_type_code = 'Shipping'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM Customers
JOIN Customer_Addresses ON Customers.customer_id = Customer_Addresses.customer_id
JOIN Customer_Orders ON Customers.customer_id = Customer_Orders.customer_id
WHERE Customers.customer_phone = '(840)754-4148x20545'
  AND Customers.customer_email = 'elva.mccullough@example.org'
  AND Customer_Addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-13 08:21:27'
  AND Customer_Addresses.address_type_code = 'Shipping'
  AND Customer_Orders.order_delivered_datetime >= '2018-03-20 12:00:00'

records.question: Which customers who received mailshots had orders delivered on or before 2018-03-20 12:00:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customer_orders.order_delivered_datetime <= '2018-03-20 12:00:00'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Orders co ON c.customer_id = co.customer_id
JOIN Mailshot_Customers mc ON c.customer_id = mc.customer_id
WHERE co.order_delivered_datetime <= '2018-03-20 12:00:00'
